titleStmt.title: SII 9.207: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 207. (A.R. No. 350 of 1905.) ON A SLAB SET UP TO THE WEST OF THE SIVA TEMPLE IN PEDDAMUDIYAM, JAMMALAMADUGU TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka 1046 and Chālukya-Vikrama year 49, Krōdhin, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti, corresponding probably to A.D. 1124 December 24 (not verifiable). It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva ruling from Jayantīpura and mentions his feudatory, the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Atyaṇachōḷa-Mahārāja, son of Sōvaṇachōḷa-Mahārāja and Gōsanamahādēvi. Atyaṇa's feudatory, the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Chiddaṇa-Chōḷamahārāja is stated to have made a grant of the village Mudivēmu to the Mahājanas of that place. The grant was made in the presence of god Narasiṁhadēva of Ahōbala. Chiddaṇa-Heggaḍe's brother Chāvuṇḍarāya wrote the inscription and Bammōja engraved it.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī śrī śrī śrī śrī śrī śrī śrī śrī
jayatyāviṣkritaṁ viṣṇōrvvārāhaṁ kṣōbhitārṇnavaṁ . dakṣiṇōnnatadaṁṣṭrāgra
viśrāntabhuvanaṁ vapuḥ . svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ ma
hārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷu
kyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattri bhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivri
ddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttaṁ jayaṁtīpureda nelevīḍi
noḷu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire tatpādapadmōpajī
vi samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvarananēkaripudurddharavara
bhujāsibhāsura pracaṁḍapradyōditadinakarakulanaṁdanaṁ kāsyapagō
traṁ kalikālānvayaṁ kāvērīvallabhaṁ paṁpaṟeghōṣaṇaṁ mayūrapiṁcha
dhvajaṁ siṁhalāṁchananoṟayorppuravarēśvaraṁ paracakradhavaḷaṁ maṁḍaḷika
śikhāmaṇi śaraṇāgatarakṣāmaṇi cōḷasāmanta goṁdaḷabaḍivaṁ
nāmādisamastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ sōvaṇacō
ḻamahārājarggaṁ gōsanamahādēviyarggaṁ suputraḥ kuladīpa
kanenisi vaṁśavardhdhananāgi puṭṭida samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanma
hāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ Atyaṇacōḷamahārājara tatpādapadmōpajīvigaḷa
ppaṇugadhavarmmaṁ samastapraśestisahitaṁ caturmmukhagoṁ
ḷabaḍivaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvara vīramahēśvaraṁ ciddaṇa
cōḷamahārājaru mosa bīḍikeyāgi heḍaka
ḻamaṁ Avukumaṁ tumaṁ rēnāḍerppattumaṁ duṣṭani
grahasiṣṭapratipāḷanadiṁdāḷdu lōpamāgirddagrahāra
dēvabhōgaṁgaḷaṁ punarbhbharaṇaṁ māḍutta vubhayasāmyamanā
ḷutta sukhadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamirddu śakavarṣa 1046 naḍeyu
ttamiralu śrīmaccāḷukyavikramakālada 49 neya krōdhisaṁ
vatsaramuttarāyaṇasaṁkrāṁtinimittadiṁ śrīparvvatada dakṣiṇa
dvārādhiṣṭhita maṁgaḷamaṇikaḷaśatōraṇāḷaṁkritamumanēka
maṇimayōttuṁgaramyaharmyapurōpāṁtasphuradruciraga
ganagaṁgājala taraṁgālōla sitakamaḷavanarajaḥppuṁja
samuditakalahaṁsāyamānamumappa śrīmadahōbalada nārasiṁhadēvara sannidhānadalu tatsamīpavartti caturyyu
gaparyyaṁtanadiṁ vappa grāmacakravartti piriyagra
hāra mudivēmunalliya mahājana yamaniyama
svādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamaunānuṣṭhāṇajapasamādhiguṇa
sīḷasaṁpannaruṁ hiraṇyagarbhavaṁśōttamaru Agniṣṭō
mādyanēka gamāvabhyatasnānapavitrībhūtaruṁ sa
kaḷavēdavidyādhyayanayajanayājanadānapratigra
haṣaṭukarmmanirataruṁ manvādipurāṇamunigaṇaviśuddha
mārggaruṁ śrībhagavannārāyaṇacaraṇāṁbujasmaraṇapariṇa
tāṁtaḥkaraṇaruṁ śrīviṣṇuvardhdhanamahārājādhirāja niḍgalā
ditya gaṁgaraṭṭajanmasarōjaniḷayaruṁ caturddaśavidyāsthānapā
rāvārapāragaruṁ caturyyugaparicatavirāja
mānarappa nūṟeṁbara kālaṁ karcciyalliya catussīmeyoḷagaṇa ni
dhinidhānapraviṣṭasahitaṁ tribhōgābhyaṁtarasiddhiyiṁ paramē
svaradattiyāgi dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭarī dharmmamanā
rānuvaḷidavaru gaṁgeyoḷaṁ prayāgeyoḷaṁ vāraṇāsiyoḷaṁ
sāsira kavileyumaṁ sāsirbbaru vēdapāragarumanaḷida pātaka
kke saluvaru . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharaṁ saṣṭirvarṣasa
haśrāṇi miṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . madvaṁśajāḥ paramahī
pativaṁśajā va pāpādapētamanasō bhuvi bhāvibhūpā . yē
pālayaṁti mama dharmmamimaṁ samastaṁ tēṣāṁ mayā(ṁ) viracitāṁjaḷi
rēṣa mūrdhni(ḥ) . kattaḷananēṟi samaradoḷattigabhūpāḷaneydevare
kaṁḍu bhayaṁbettājiraṁgadoḷu bennittarccelvattirāyanuṁ beṭṭuvanu .
madavadvairikṣamāpāḷakanikaraśiracchēdanakkeṁdu bayati
rddudane tāṁ kīḷpene mallaṁ gaḍa sitaniśātāsiyaṁ koḷḷadutkōpa
dagurbbaṁ toṟadāṭaṁduṟade baḍigeyiṁ māḍidaṁ vīralakṣmī
sadanaṁ māṟāṁtaraṁ cōḷikaranamama vācāḷaraṁ cōḷacidda . gaṁḍara
kṣāmaṇi bhīmaṁ maṁḍaḷikaragaṁḍanaṇakadadaṭaragaṁḍaṁ toṁḍakoṁḍege ma
hindaragaṁḍaṁ maṁḍaḷikaciddi ripubhēruṁḍaṁ . ciddaṇaherggaḍeya tammaṁ
cāmuṁḍarāyaṁ baredaṁ kāsiga bammōjaṁ kaṁḍarisidaṁ ©
Digital edition of SII 9.207 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
